name: meeting-copilot
description: Layer 3 meeting decision copilot native desktop app with replayable core.

scripts.tauri:dev: npm run build && npm run native:helpers && node scripts/run-with-rust.mjs npx tauri dev
scripts.native:build: npm run build && npm run native:helpers && node scripts/run-with-rust.mjs npx tauri build --debug
scripts.native:build:mac: npm run build && npm run native:helpers && node scripts/run-with-rust.mjs npx tauri build --debug --bundles app
scripts.native:build:windows: npm run build && npm run native:helpers && node scripts/run-with-rust.mjs npx tauri build --debug --bundles nsis,msi
scripts.verify: npm run build && npm run native:helpers && npm test && npm run migrate && npm run replay && npm run manual && npm run stt:bakeoff && npm run rust:test && npm run native:build
